title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Intel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!
